summary: Pre-commit related-tests exposed that runtime-card git inspection could inherit Git hook environment variables and inspect the outer JSC-331 worktree instead of the --repo fixture. evidence.pre_commit_blocker: src/commands/runtime-card.test.ts expected JSC-311 but received JSC-331 during pre-commit related-tests
evidence.root_cause: GIT_DIR/GIT_WORK_TREE from the hook environment could override child git commands despite cwd being set to the requested repoRoot.
evidence.fix: defaultGitRunner now deletes GIT_COMMON_DIR, GIT_DIR, GIT_INDEX_FILE, and GIT_WORK_TREE before running git; runtime-card CLI test contaminates process env with a JSC-999 repo and still expects JSC-311 from --repo evidence.
